description:
Goal: introduce the function-local body layer that semantic jobs read. Expanded `FnDef` remains the definition fact; `LoweredBody(function)` becomes the semantic input fact.

Change:
- Add `Job::LowerFunction(FunctionId)` and `FactKey::LoweredBody(FunctionId)`.
- Add a Compiler2-owned body store keyed by `FunctionId`; do not introduce a separate body id unless a later artifact boundary proves it is needed.
- A lowered body owns stable function-local value/block/callsite facts for direct calls, tuple/list literals, tuple destructure, branches, returns, and generated lambda/continuation function definitions needed by the lowered function.
- `LowerFunction` reads `FunctionDefined(function)`, waits if the function is still a placeholder, lowers only that function, publishes `LoweredBody(function)`, and leaves unrelated functions cold.
- `SeedRoot` follows up with `LowerFunction(entry)` and the first semantic jobs; it still reports unresolved roots through the existing drive outcome when the entry definition is missing.

Why:
- Type and planning rules need stable local IDs, callsite shape, continuation shape, and destructure context. That is lowering-shaped data, not source AST data.
- Calling the legacy `lower_program` would eagerly prepend runtime source, register/lower every function, require flattened modules, and recreate the whole-program phase model. Compiler2 needs a per-function pull boundary.
- Keeping body facts root-independent lets multiple roots reuse lowered bodies without making those bodies semantically reachable by themselves.

Checks:
- Submitting quicksort plus uncalled `foo/0`, then rooting `main/0`, publishes `LoweredBody(main/0)` and no `LoweredBody(foo/0)`.
- Defining a root before code still finishes unresolved, then resolves after code submission without forcing unrelated body lowering.
- Existing source/module/import behavior remains green.
- Telemetry proves no `fz.frontend.lowered`, `fz.planner.planned`, codegen, or artifact work runs.

Non-goals:
- Recursive activation widening and root retraction stay in `fz-rh2.6.3`.
- Protocol dispatch, runtime-library pull-through, and callable reducers stay in `fz-rh2.7.*`.
- Artifact materialization and ABI/codegen stay in `fz-rh2.8.*`.
title: Compiler2 body: lower demanded functions into owned body facts
